text: Pilot Rodgers confirms Prince Andrew and Adam Perry were on the same Epstein flight
FBI search warrant executed July 6, 2019 — housekeeper found inside, plain-view evidence obtained
Pilot Rodgers: flight log initials "AP" = Adam Perry — Prince Andrew was on same Epstein flight
Victim: Maxwell collected her from airport for NM ranch trip; Epstein present during abusive massage
FBI executes search warrant at Epstein NYC townhouse July 6 2019, finds housekeeper, discovers items in plain view
